name: What settings should I check before I assume Siri is broken?
description: Check Siri enabled status, suggestions, microphone access, and one simple test command before assuming Siri is broken.

mainEntity.name: What settings should I check before I assume Siri is broken?

acceptedAnswer.text: Open Siri & Search settings and confirm that Siri is enabled, Suggestions are on, and the microphone has access. Then test one simple command like setting a reminder to see whether the issue is general or tied to a specific app.
acceptedAnswer.description: Check Siri enabled status, suggestions, microphone access, and one simple test command before assuming Siri is broken.
